'''bashuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headiness|headiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headiness|headiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bashuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæshiyith|bæshiyith]] || [[word:bæshiyij|bæshiyij]] || [[word:bæshiyish|bæshiyish]] || [[word:bæshiyi|bæshiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashushuyuth|bashushuyuth]] || [[word:bashushuyuj|bashushuyuj]] || [[word:bashushuyush|bashushuyush]] || [[word:bashushuyu|bashushuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashuyuth|bashuyuth]] || [[word:bashuyuj|bashuyuj]] || [[word:bashuyush|bashuyush]] || [[word:bashuyu|bashuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashufyufth|bashufyufth]] || [[word:bashufyufj|bashufyufj]] || [[word:bashufyufsh|bashufyufsh]] || [[word:bashufyuf|bashufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bashuyuthu|bashuyuthu]] || [[word:bashuyuju|bashuyuju]] || [[word:bashuyushu|bashuyushu]] || [[word:bashuyuku|bashuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bashuyuth|bashuyuth]] || [[word:bashuyuj|bashuyuj]] || [[word:bashuyush|bashuyush]] || [[word:bashuyu|bashuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bashuyuthul|bashuyuthul]] || [[word:bashuyujul|bashuyujul]] || [[word:bashuyushul|bashuyushul]] || [[word:bashuyukul|bashuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bashuyuuthuthu|bashuyuuthuthu]] || [[word:bashuyuujuju|bashuyuujuju]] || [[word:bashuyuushushu|bashuyuushushu]] || [[word:bashuyuuku|bashuyuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bashuyuthun|bashuyuthun]] || [[word:bashuyujun|bashuyujun]] || [[word:bashuyushun|bashuyushun]] || [[word:bashuyukun|bashuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bashuyuthuoro|bashuyuthuoro]] || [[word:bashuyujuoro|bashuyujuoro]] || [[word:bashuyushuoro|bashuyushuoro]] || [[word:bashuyukuoro|bashuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a890715}}
